question: Analyzing the area chart of annual profit from 2018 to 2022, which of the following assertions appears accurate?

options.B: Profit in both 2021 and 2022 is clearly identical.
options.C: 2018 had the lowest recorded profit among all the years shown.
options.D: Profit decreased steadily over the entire period.

explanation: Bars for the highest years exceed the canvas and are clipped, making them look the same height; the true relationship cannot be inferred from the visual.
